chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4414 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to non-prosecution 25.9.2025 Mr. Mehtab Ali Soomro advocate for the petitioners alongwith petitioners Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant AG Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional PG IO/SI Zahoor Memon, PS Mari Mangi, District Khairpur Mir’s -------------------------------- Investigating Officer SI Zahoor Memon of Police Station Mangi Mari, District Khairpur Mir’s present in Court has recorded Section 161 Cr.P.C. statement of Mst. Saeeda Batool (petitioner No.1) and states that on the basis of her Section 161 Cr.P.C. statement he shall file his report before the concerned Magistrate within three days of the date of this order. He shall ensure that he does so. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
